conversation_summary: A 55-year-old male presents with persistent chest pain radiating to his left arm for the past 3 hours. He has a history of hypertension and type 2 diabetes. Currently on metformin 1000mg BD and amlodipine 5mg OD. He is a smoker (20 pack-years). BP 160/95 mmHg, HR 92 bpm, SpO2 97%. ECG shows ST-segment elevation in leads II, III, aVF.

expected_soap.subjective: Chest pain radiating to left arm, 3 hours duration. History of hypertension and T2DM. Smoker 20 pack-years.
expected_soap.objective: BP 160/95, HR 92, SpO2 97%. ECG: ST elevation leads II, III, aVF.
expected_soap.assessment: Acute inferior STEMI. Uncontrolled hypertension. Type 2 diabetes.
expected_soap.plan: Activate cath lab for primary PCI. Aspirin 300mg stat. Heparin bolus. Serial troponins. Cardiology consult.

conversation_summary: A 42-year-old female presents with a 2-week history of progressive fatigue, weight gain of 5 kg, constipation, and feeling cold all the time. She also reports dry skin and hair loss. No significant past medical history. On examination: BMI 29, HR 58 bpm, BP 110/70. Skin is dry, mild periorbital edema noted. Thyroid gland palpable but not enlarged.

expected_soap.subjective: 2-week fatigue, 5kg weight gain, constipation, cold intolerance, dry skin, hair loss. No PMH.
expected_soap.objective: BMI 29, HR 58, BP 110/70. Dry skin, periorbital edema. Thyroid palpable, not enlarged.
expected_soap.plan: Check TSH, free T4, thyroid antibodies. Lipid panel. Start levothyroxine if confirmed. Follow-up in 6 weeks.

conversation_summary: A 68-year-old male with known COPD (GOLD stage III) presents with worsening breathlessness over the past 5 days, increased sputum production (now purulent), and a low-grade fever. Currently on tiotropium and salbutamol inhalers. On examination: temp 37.8°C, RR 24, SpO2 89% on room air, bilateral wheezing with reduced air entry at right base.

expected_soap.subjective: 5-day worsening breathlessness, purulent sputum, low-grade fever. Known COPD GOLD III. On tiotropium and salbutamol.
expected_soap.objective: Temp 37.8°C, RR 24, SpO2 89% RA. Bilateral wheeze, reduced air entry right base.
expected_soap.assessment: Acute exacerbation of COPD with lower respiratory tract infection.
expected_soap.plan: Oxygen to target SpO2 88-92%. Nebulized salbutamol and ipratropium. Prednisolone 40mg x 5 days. Amoxicillin 500mg TDS. Chest X-ray. ABG.

conversation_summary: A 30-year-old female presents with severe right lower quadrant abdominal pain that started 12 hours ago as periumbilical pain and migrated. Associated nausea and one episode of vomiting. No diarrhea. LMP 2 weeks ago, regular. Temp 38.2°C, HR 100, BP 120/80. Tenderness and guarding in RLQ with positive McBurney's point and Rovsing's sign. WBC 14,500.

expected_soap.subjective: 12-hour abdominal pain migrated from periumbilical to RLQ. Nausea, one vomit. LMP 2 weeks ago.
expected_soap.objective: Temp 38.2°C, HR 100, BP 120/80. RLQ tenderness, guarding. McBurney's positive, Rovsing's positive. WBC 14,500.
expected_soap.plan: NPO. IV fluids. CT abdomen/pelvis for confirmation. Surgical consult for appendectomy. IV antibiotics (cefoxitin or piperacillin-tazobactam). Urine pregnancy test.

conversation_summary: A 7-year-old boy brought by his mother with recurrent episodes of wheezing and cough, especially at night and during exercise, for the past 6 months. Family history of atopy — mother has allergic rhinitis. No hospitalizations. On examination: occasional expiratory wheeze bilaterally, no respiratory distress currently. SpO2 98%. Peak flow 75% predicted.

expected_soap.subjective: 6-month recurrent wheeze and cough, worse at night and with exercise. Family history of atopy (maternal allergic rhinitis).
expected_soap.objective: Occasional bilateral expiratory wheeze. No distress. SpO2 98%. PEFR 75% predicted.
expected_soap.assessment: Mild persistent asthma in a child with atopic predisposition.
expected_soap.plan: Initiate low-dose ICS (beclometasone 100mcg BD). Salbutamol PRN. Asthma action plan. Allergen avoidance counseling. Spirometry if cooperative. Review in 4 weeks.
